_comment: Settings for the prompt-auto-enhance plugin. Everything is ON by default, so a fresh install gives you the full prompt-improver. To change anything: copy this file to <your-project>/.claude/enhance-settings.json and edit it (or run /enhance-config). Changes take effect on your NEXT message — no reinstall. The _help section below explains every setting in plain English.

_help.enabled: Master switch for the whole prompt-improver. false = turn everything off.
_help.when_to_run: automatic = improve every real prompt; ask_first = only improve when you reply 'enhance'; off = never improve (but the plugin stays installed).
_help.after_improving: run_immediately = improve the prompt and answer in one go; let_me_review_first = improve the prompt, show it to you, then STOP and wait for you to approve/edit/run it.
_help.when_to_enhance.skip_short_prompts: Don't bother improving tiny prompts. count_by words or characters; minimum = the cutoff below which a prompt is skipped.
_help.when_to_enhance.skip_these_phrases: Exact replies that are just continuations (yes/ok/thanks...) and shouldn't be improved.
_help.when_to_enhance.skip_phrases_starting_wi: Short prompts that begin with these (now do.../also...) are follow-ups, not new tasks — skip them.
_help.when_to_enhance.min_response_size_to_che: Only judge an answer 'substantial' (worth quality-checking) once it passes this many characters.
_help.display.show_the_process: true = show you the improvement steps; false = improve silently and just answer.
_help.display.show_when: every_time = always show the steps; only_weak_prompts = show the full steps only when your prompt scored poorly, otherwise a one-liner.
_help.display.weak_prompt_score_below: With only_weak_prompts: a prompt scoring below this number is treated as weak (and gets the full display).
_help.display.show: Checkboxes for WHICH parts you see. Turn any combination on/off (presets: /enhance-config render all | render none).
_help.improving.skip_if_already_grade: Don't rewrite a prompt that already scores this grade or better (A = leave great prompts alone).
_help.improving.add_role_when_score_below: If the prompt's role/framing scores below this, add an 'Act as ...' persona.
_help.scoring_criteria: The rubric used to score a prompt. Each criterion has a weight; the weights must add up to 1.0.
_help.ask_clarifying_questions: Whether to ask you a question when the request is ambiguous. ask_until_confidence = how sure it must be before proceeding; max_questions 0 = no limit.
_help.quality_checks: Self-checks that the improvement steps were actually shown. block = stop and re-do; warn = just log; off = ignore.
_help.context_levels: Which background-context levels to gather before answering.
